# Get AI Native

Get AI Native is a workshop-led site about AI-native software development for engineering teams.

Primary pages:
- https://getainative.com/
- https://getainative.com/blog/
- https://getainative.com/about/
- https://getainative.com/rss.xml
- https://getainative.com/sitemap-index.xml

Summary:
- The homepage describes a hands-on workshop for engineering teams on AI-native development workflows.
- The blog covers automation, code review, judgment, testing, and practical engineering use of AI tools.
- The site is authored by Vamsi Gunturu.

Contact:
- Workshop booking: https://calendly.com/gvpmahesh/ai-native-sdlc-workshop-discovery-call
